ideation: This animation sequence will portray a gentle, curious exploration of the orange circle emoji. The robot will initially hold its arms close to its body, then extend them outward in a gesture of inspection, and finally return to a relaxed position.  The movement aims to capture a sense of playful curiosity, mirroring the soft and inviting appearance of the orange circle.  The use of both arms in a symmetrical way helps maintain a balanced and focused expression.

frames.beat: arms hug the body, curious about the orange circle
arms extend outward, gently inspecting the circle
arms return to a relaxed, thoughtful pose
